title: Double logo size in Navigation and Footer components

requirements.text: Increase the logo size in the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) by 100 percent from the current h-16 size by changing the height class to h-32 and adjusting the container height from h-24 to h-40 proportionally

quotes: No increase the size my 100 percent

acceptanceCriteria: Logo image in Navigation.tsx uses h-32 height class (doubled from h-16)
Navigation container height is adjusted proportionally to h-40 (doubled from h-24)
Logo displays correctly in both desktop and mobile views without layout breaks
Logo remains properly aligned with navigation menu items

requirements.text: Increase the logo size in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) by 100 percent from the current h-14 size by changing the height class to h-28 to match the proportional increase applied in Navigation

quotes: No increase the size my 100 percent

acceptanceCriteria: Logo image in Footer.tsx uses h-28 height class (doubled from h-14)
Logo displays correctly in the footer layout without overflow or distortion
Footer layout remains balanced with the larger logo size
Logo maintains aspect ratio and clarity at the increased size

constraints: Do not modify the logo image file itself (image_8a526262-3a20-4994-9dc2-1df6b5d6410e-1.png)
Maintain responsive design for both mobile and desktop views
Do not change Navigation or Footer component structure beyond size adjustments
nonGoals: Changing the logo image source or file
Modifying other navigation or footer styling beyond logo size
Adding new navigation items or footer sections
Adjusting logo sizes on other pages or components
